title: Claude Fable 5 is here!
summary: Claude Fable 5 is a new language model from Anthropic. A YouTube video reviews its capabilities across tasks including 3D reconstruction, music composition, chemistry, and cancer classification, and compares it to GPT 5.5.
writeup: The video reviews Claude Fable 5, a new language model from Anthropic, walking through its performance across several tasks: 3D reconstruction, music composition, chemistry, and cancer classification. It also sets the model against GPT 5.5 for comparison. The result is a capability survey that spans both creative and scientific domains, with the head-to-head framing the central reference point.
